section_map.heading: I. INTRODUCTION
section_map.zh: 定位问题背景、研究缺口和为什么现有保守/非协同方法不足。
section_map.en: Frames the motivation, research gap, and limits of conservative or non-cooperative methods.

section_map.heading: II. V EHICLE SIDESLIP ANGLE ESTIMATION
section_map.zh: 作为局部论证段落阅读，关注它如何服务主问题。
section_map.en: Read as a local argument and ask how it supports the main question.

section_map.heading: III. T RAJECTORY TRACKING CONTROL OF AVS
section_map.zh: 给出算法流程和求解机制，应重点追踪输入、输出和安全接口。
section_map.en: Gives the algorithmic mechanism; track inputs, outputs, and safety interfaces.

section_map.heading: IV. C OLLABORATIVE CONTROL OF CAVS
section_map.zh: 给出算法流程和求解机制，应重点追踪输入、输出和安全接口。
section_map.en: Gives the algorithmic mechanism; track inputs, outputs, and safety interfaces.

section_map.heading: V. CONCLUSION AND FUTURE WORKS
section_map.zh: 总结贡献和未来方向，也常暴露作者承认的边界条件。
section_map.en: Summarizes contributions and often reveals author-recognized boundaries.

textbook_study_path: 第一遍先读首页截图、摘要与引言，确认研究问题和场景假设。
第二遍沿着技术路线图复现模型变量、约束和求解器输入输出。
第三遍逐节阅读 section deep reading，对照 PDF 截图检查公式、图表和实验。
第四遍只站在审稿人视角重读实验，判断 baseline、公平性、消融和鲁棒性。
最后把博士 checklist 写成自己的复现实验或论文拓展计划。

section_deep_reading.heading: I. INTRODUCTION
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 建立研究动机：为什么传统信号控制、FCFS 或单车控制不足以处理该论文关注的交叉口协同问题。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Understand why the paper needs a new coordination method rather than a standard signal, FCFS, or single-vehicle controller.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 这一部分通常把痛点落到 CAV control survey：既要提高效率，又要保持安全与在线可执行。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 精读时标出作者批判的 baseline、场景假设、交通参与者类型和隐含优化目标。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 作者指出的痛点是否真的需要新方法，还是可以由更强的优化器/更保守规则解决？

section_deep_reading.heading: II. V EHICLE SIDESLIP ANGLE ESTIMATION
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 承接前后章节，补充局部定义、案例或实现细节。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Recover implementation details needed for reproduction.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 这类章节常常不是主贡献，但决定你能否真正复现方法。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 检查它是否给出了参数、伪代码、场景划分或实现细节。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 跳过该节会不会导致公式或实验无法复现？

section_deep_reading.heading: III. T RAJECTORY TRACKING CONTROL OF AVS
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 解释算法如何把模型转化为可执行决策，并说明在线运行机制。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Trace how the paper turns the model into executable online decisions.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 作为综述，它按估计、跟踪、路径规划、协同控制等层次整理方法。对本项目最有价值的是把 comfort、safety、energy、efficiency 放入同一个 CAV 控制目标谱系。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 画出输入、核心求解器、输出和安全检查接口，明确哪些步骤是优化、哪些是规则、哪些是学习。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 若算法某一步失败，论文有没有 fallback、重规划或安全过滤机制？

section_deep_reading.heading: IV. C OLLABORATIVE CONTROL OF CAVS
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 解释算法如何把模型转化为可执行决策，并说明在线运行机制。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Trace how the paper turns the model into executable online decisions.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 作为综述，它按估计、跟踪、路径规划、协同控制等层次整理方法。对本项目最有价值的是把 comfort、safety、energy、efficiency 放入同一个 CAV 控制目标谱系。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 画出输入、核心求解器、输出和安全检查接口，明确哪些步骤是优化、哪些是规则、哪些是学习。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 若算法某一步失败，论文有没有 fallback、重规划或安全过滤机制？

section_deep_reading.heading: V. CONCLUSION AND FUTURE WORKS
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 提炼作者承认的边界，并把它转化为博士课题的可拓展问题。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Convert acknowledged boundaries into research opportunities.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 结论不只是总结结果，更是观察作者没有解决什么的窗口。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 把 future work 与前文假设逐一对应，寻找可发表的补强点。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 如果我是审稿人，我会要求补哪一个实验、定理或消融？

paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 先把作者的痛点翻译成一句博士问题：CAV 控制从状态估计、轨迹跟踪到协同控制有哪些主线方法，它们如何支撑交叉口协同研究？ 读这一段时不要急着接受动机，要追问传统 FCFS、信号灯或保守 MPC 为什么不足。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Turn the opening motivation into one doctoral-level question and test whether the paper truly needs a new method.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Assumption and setting / 假设与场景段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 把车辆类型、通信条件、路口类型和动力学假设列成表。该文的关键边界包括：文献覆盖广但不可避免存在选择偏差。；不同控制任务和应用场景的指标不可直接比较。；综述结论需要回到具体论文验证。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: List vehicle type, communication, intersection setting, and dynamics assumptions before reading the equations.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Model and notation / 模型与符号段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 围绕核心公式“通用车辆控制闭环 / Generic vehicle-control loop”复写符号表，确认每个变量是决策变量、状态变量、参数还是约束阈值。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Rewrite the symbol table around the core formulation and classify variables as states, decisions, parameters, or constraints.

paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 把算法读成一条数据流：输入交通状态，执行 Systematic survey from vehicle state estimation and trajectory tracking to collaborative CAV control applications.，输出可执行通行/控制决策，并检查安全接口。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Read the algorithm as a dataflow from traffic state to executable sequence/control decision, with explicit safety interfaces.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Experiment and evidence / 实验证据段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 不要只看作者报告的提升，要检查基准、公平性和指标。本文验证描述为：Literature survey rather than original experiments.
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Go beyond reported gains and inspect baselines, fairness, metrics, and computation time.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Reviewer synthesis / 审稿式总结段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 最后把贡献拆成可发表与需补强两部分。对你课题最直接的用途是：Useful context citation for why trajectory tracking, collaborative control, safety, comfort, and energy belong together.
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Separate publishable contribution from missing evidence, then connect the result to your own thesis architecture.

technical_route.content: 车辆状态、路径/车道、交通需求、信号或协同信息。
通用车辆控制闭环 / Generic vehicle-control loop
Systematic survey from vehicle state estimation and trajectory tracking to collaborative CAV control applications.
Reviews vehicle-control approaches relevant to safety and collaborative control.
Frames comfort, energy saving, and transportation efficiency as central CAV control goals.
Literature survey rather than original experiments.

contribution_matrix.dimension: 博士课题价值 / PhD relevance
contribution_matrix.comment: Useful context citation for why trajectory tracking, collaborative control, safety, comfort, and energy belong together.

doctoral_checklist: 能否独立重写核心公式：通用车辆控制闭环 / Generic vehicle-control loop，并解释每个符号的物理意义？
能否画出输入-模型-算法-控制-验证的数据流图？
能否指出至少两个强假设，并说明它们在真实交通中何时失效？
能否复述实验基准是否公平，指标是否覆盖效率、安全、能耗和计算时间？
能否提出一个与自己 JSSP/RL/smoother 课题直接相连的拓展实验？

overview.background_zh: 这篇论文位于“CAV control survey”方向。对你的 JSSP-based Intersection Management 课题，它回答的是高层调度、低层轨迹平滑、安全过滤或真实验证中的一个关键子问题：如何让车辆在路口少停、少冲突、少能耗，同时保持在线可执行。
overview.background_en: The paper belongs to the theme of CAV control survey. For a JSSP-based intersection-management thesis, it illuminates one of the key layers: scheduling, smoothing, safety filtering, or real-world validation.
overview.pain_zh: Broad CAV control overview; not intersection-smoothing specific.
overview.pain_en: The main pain point is that efficient intersection coordination must handle combinatorial interactions, continuous vehicle dynamics, and safety constraints under online computation limits.
overview.core_question_zh: CAV 控制从状态估计、轨迹跟踪到协同控制有哪些主线方法，它们如何支撑交叉口协同研究？
overview.core_question_en: What are the main CAV control families from state estimation to trajectory tracking and cooperative control, and how do they frame intersection research?
contributions: 方法贡献 (method contribution)：Systematic survey from vehicle state estimation and trajectory tracking to collaborative CAV control applications.
安全/避碰贡献 (safety contribution)：Reviews vehicle-control approaches relevant to safety and collaborative control.
平滑/停止避免贡献 (smoothing contribution)：Frames comfort, energy saving, and transportation efficiency as central CAV control goals.
创新力度评判 (reviewer judgement)：综述价值强但原创方法弱：适合作为背景和分类框架引用，不应当作为核心算法依据。

methodology.model_name: 通用车辆控制闭环 / Generic vehicle-control loop
symbols: 轨迹规划/调度层给定目标
methodology.algorithm_zh: 作为综述，它按估计、跟踪、路径规划、协同控制等层次整理方法。对本项目最有价值的是把 comfort、safety、energy、efficiency 放入同一个 CAV 控制目标谱系。
methodology.algorithm_en: As a survey, it organizes estimation, tracking, planning, and cooperative-control techniques, framing safety, comfort, energy, and efficiency as connected CAV objectives.
methodology.stability_zh: 综述不提供单个算法的收敛证明，但能帮助你定位不同方法的理论依据，如鲁棒控制、MPC、学习控制和协同控制。
methodology.stability_en: It does not certify one algorithm, but it maps the theoretical families used to justify robust control, MPC, learning control, and cooperative control.
assumptions: 文献覆盖广但不可避免存在选择偏差。
不同控制任务和应用场景的指标不可直接比较。
综述结论需要回到具体论文验证。

experiments.validation: Literature survey rather than original experiments.
experiments.baselines: 不适用原始实验；基准是分类完整性、代表性文献覆盖和趋势判断。
experiments.metrics: 综述质量、分类清晰度、引用覆盖、应用关联度和未来方向启发。
experiments.ablation: 综述没有消融；阅读时应做你自己的 taxonomy cross-check：是否遗漏 intersection scheduling、formal safety、mixed traffic。

figure_table_cues.reading: 先确认输入、决策层、控制层和安全约束之间的数据流。
关注约束激活位置、速度/加速度曲线和安全裕度是否平滑。
重点看平均值之外的密度变化、失败场景、计算时间和方差。

experiments.reviewer_reading: 阅读实验时不要只看平均值；应检查交通密度、车流方向、随机种子、失败案例和计算耗时。For doctoral reading, inspect density regimes, demand patterns, random seeds, failure cases, and computation time rather than only mean improvements.

limitations: 范围太广，交叉口轨迹平滑不是焦点。
综述时效性随新 RL/CBF/GNN 文献快速下降。
缺少统一实验平台比较。
extensions: 把综述分类裁剪成你的 thesis taxonomy：scheduler、smoother、safety filter、evaluation。
建立一张 CAV 控制方法与 JSSP/RL/AIM 的映射表。
用它支持引言中 safety-comfort-energy-efficiency 多目标论证。
critique.project_use: Useful context citation for why trajectory tracking, collaborative control, safety, comfort, and energy belong together.

interactive.response_zh: 成熟度越高可验证性越强，但探索性和性能上限可能较低。
interactive.response_en: Higher maturity improves certifiability but may reduce exploratory performance.

html_structure: 顶部固定 metadata bar：题名、作者、年份、主题、PDF 页数。
左侧目录/section navigator，右侧为五大精读模块。
公式卡片使用 <pre> 或 LaTeX block，紧跟符号表。
审稿人批注用 reviewer-note block，博士拓展用 research-idea list。
交互参数用 input[type=range] + canvas 曲线，打印 PDF 时隐藏交互控件但保留解释。
